In this video, we break down the REAL differences between Technician and General class amateur radio licenses — what you can and can't do with each, and why so many Technicians end up leaving the hobby.

👇 Here's what we cover:
0:00 — Intro / The Japan Question
0:50 — What both licenses share
1:26 — What Technician class actually lets you do

4:13 — The mistake most Technicians make
5:21 — Why studying for both at once is smarter
6:04 — Full license comparison summary

snippet.title: GRANDPA'S HAM RADIO PICKS UP A SPACE STATION
snippet.description: My grandfather built his ham radio setup in 1986 and talked to strangers every night from his garage in Tucson. Last Thanksgiving, I was helping him adjust the antenna when a voice cut through the static. Clear as anything. "This is the ISS, who am I talking to?" Grandpa didn't even flinch. 'Frank Delgado, Tucson, Arizona. You're coming in a little scratchy." The astronaut laughed. They talked for four minutes about the weather and Grandpa's tomato garden. NASA later confirmed the contact and sent him a certificate. He framed it next to his original FCC license. Hasn't stopped telling the mailman about it since.

snippet.title: La radio como detector de tormentas eléctricas
snippet.description:
En este video que fue grabado a las 20:00 hs, UTC del día 21 de abril de 2026 se puede oir chasquidos sobre el ruido de fondo del receptor y que son causados por tormentas electricas cercanas. En la banda de 40 m. ( 7 Mhz.) normalmente es la mas propicia para oir estas descargas 
aunque en gral. las bandas bajas de HF suelen ser propicias para su recepcion.

snippet.title: New Icom X-026 Concept Radio! Dayton Hamvention [2026]
snippet.description:
New Icom X-026 Concept Radio! Dayton Hamvention [2026] 

🇺🇸Unveiling at Dayton Hamvention 2026

The Icom X-026 is a new concept radio model. Icom announced that it will showcase this "new product concept mock" for the first time globally at the Dayton Hamvention 2026, which takes place from May 15 to 17. 

Known Details & Speculation
While official technical specifications haven't been fully released, early teasers and observations from the amateur radio community suggest:

Design: 
The unit features a squared-off front panel and reportedly consists of two separate units.

Interface: 
It appears to have a large tuning knob and a touchscreen interface, as there are no visible buttons on the front.

Capabilities: 
It is advertised as an HF/VHF/UHF mobile radio.

Speculated Model: 
There is speculation that it might eventually be branded as the ID-5200 (following the ID-5100) or possibly a successor to the IC-7100, potentially named the IC-7200


73 de Mark 2E1CEQ

I can't guarantee the information I have received accuracy.

snippet.title: Another CB Radio Operator Arrested, Ham Radio On The ISS, & Cushcraft And Hy-Gain Is In business
snippet.description:
00:00 Hams In Space
00:42 Back In Business
01:20 CB Radio Terrorist Arrested
02:08 Classic Baofeng UV-5R Roger Beep

In This weeks Radio Dork news:
The Amateur Radio on the International Space Station program , also known as the A.R.I.S.S. or simply "ARISS" is seeking both formal and informal educational institutions and organizations to host amateur radio contacts with crew members of the International Space station in January of 2027.  Each approved contact with the space-station crew members will be approximately 10 minutes in duration, during which time the radio operator will be able to ask the astronauts questions. Proposals and applications must be submitted to the Ariss-USA dot ORG website by May 22.

The ITU Corporation has purchased a 15-acre unused National Guard Armory site in Indiana to serve as the new manufacturing hub for Hy-Gain and Cushcraft , which it recently acquired from MFJ Enterprises.  The acquisition of these legendary brands from MFJ Enterprises marks a new chapter for the Cushcraft and Hy-Gain brands by combining their rich history with the expertise and dedication of the Indiana-based premier manufacturer. ITU Corporation says they should have the new manufacturing site up and running within about 2 months.

For the second time in as many months, a grown man has been arrested for not playing nice on his CB Radio. As reported by the KLFY dot com website, police in Port Barre Louisiana have arrested a 61 year old man on multiple counts of terrorizing local residents after allegedly using his CB radio to transmit threatening or false statements, including allegedly threatening to go to the victims homes, unalive them, and then blow up their houses with their families still inside. All charges are criminal state charges and there are no reports of any FCC involvement.

And that is all  the radio-dork news that is fit to print..  Join me again next week, or sooner, when I may, or may not, do this again.

snippet.title: Steer Clear of Programs That Do Not Require a Fee To Renew Your License or Certification! 👿⚠️
snippet.description:
If you have to pay a fee to maintain your license or certification...good! The more you have to pay, the better! 😅💸

A renewal fee indicates a career that is higher level and better pay! 🏆💰

The recertification fees (renewal) for my RHIT (Registered Health Information Technician) is due every two years and costs $100 for AHIMA members and $249 for non-members as of March 2026. If you hold multiple credentials with AHIMA, additional certifications are free for members and $50 for non-members. Reinstatement of a lapsed credential costs $368. I am currently an AHIMA member so I pay $100 every 2 years to renew my RHIT certification! 🎉🙌

High level careers always require a renewal fee!
Physician Assistants (PAs) must pay a renewal fee to maintain their state license which typically occurs every two years. In my state, the renewal fee for a PA is $50.

DISCLAIMER: 

The content posted on my channel is for educational and informative purposes only and is not intended to be a substitute for medical professional advice, diagnosis or treatment. I do not provide counseling or coaching services of any kind. Please consult with your doctor, therapist or other mental health professional. 

In an effort to maintain a positive and safe online community on my YouTube channel and my Instagram account, comments have been turned off on both my YouTube channel and my Instagram account. Protecting myself especially on social media is my top priority. I do not allow tags, mentions or story replies on my Instagram account. They have been turned off. My Instagram direct messages (DMs) are turned on however, to honor my commitment to my marriage and to ensure my online safety, I do not respond to Instagram DM's of any kind except from my husband and close family members.

Disrespectful, sexual or predatory messages via my Instagram DMs/comments or my YouTube comments will not be tolerated and those who engage in such behavior will be blocked immediately and if I need to, you will be reported!

Any behavior I deem obsessive, predatorial, inappropriate or stalkerish will result in a block!

Those who send me a tip through my "Buy Me a Coffee" tip Jar will receive a personalized thank you message from me via my "Buy Me a Coffee" account. 

100% Private Supporter Policy 🚫

All of my supporters are kept 100% private and anonymous including my personalized thank you messages in response to any and all supporter messages on my Buy Me a Coffee Page. This means that names and/or messages will not be publicly visible in an effort to prevent public monitoring of my Buy Me a Coffee page. Names will automatically default to "someone became a supporter" rather than actual names and messages will be hidden from public view. I am able to make my supporters private on my end although supporters have the option to make their name and/or message private or public when leaving me a tip. If made public, I automatically override to ensure that information is kept private. 

To maintain a safe, positive and respectful environment on my YouTube channel, I have set up my YouTube channel to hold all comments for manual review BEFORE they appear publicly. This means that I carefully and cautiously review all comments! If your comment does not appear, it was not approved for publication and depending on what you comment on my YouTube channel, it may lead to you being blocked from commenting on my YouTube channel indefinitely.

@BEFIRSTOfficial 
SKY-HI率いるBMSGに所属する、
SOTA 、SHUNTO 、MANATO 、 RYUHEI 、JUNON 、LEO のダンス＆ボーカルグループ。それぞれが歌・ダンス・ラップに対して高いクオリティとポテンシャルを持っているのと同時に、作詞・作曲・コレオグラフにまで発揮される音楽的感度の高さ、そして七者七様の個性を持った華やかさが魅力。「BE:FIRST」と名付けられた。プレデビューから日本の各種チャートの1位を席巻。ここからアジア、そして世界へと向けて偉大なる最初の一歩目を踏み出す。2025年には4都市9公演を回り約30万人を動員したグループ初の国内4大ドームツアーを経て、初の海外ツアー「BE:FIRST World Tour 2025 -Who is BE:FIRST？-」ではアメリカ・アジア・ヨーロッパ全12都市を回り世界への躍進を果たした。

snippet.title: Simple Spy Gadget Circuit! 🤫📻
snippet.description:
Make a Simple Radio Signal Blocker! (Educational) 📻🚫⚡
Simple Spy Gadget Circuit! 🤫📻
Kya aapne kabhi socha hai ki radio signals ko hawa mein kaise block kiya jata hai? 🤔 Aaj ke is interesting DIY electronics video mein hum samjhenge ek FM Radio Jammer (RF Oscillator) ka circuit diagram! 🚀
🛠️ Main Components Explained:
2N2222 Transistor: Ye ek high-frequency NPN transistor hai jo is circuit ka main engine hai.
LC Tank Circuit (L1 Coil + CV1 Trimmer): Ye dono milkar frequency tay karte hain. Trimmer (6-35p) ko ghuma kar aap specific FM frequency (88-108 MHz) par tune kar sakte hain.
Antenna: Radio waves ko hawa mein transmit karne ke liye.
⚙️ Kaise Kaam Karta Hai? Ye circuit ek bohot hi strong bina aawaz wali (blank) radio frequency paida karta hai. Jab aap isey kisi chalte hue FM Radio ke paas rakhte hain, toh radio original channel ko chhod kar is circuit ka signal pakad leta hai, aur aawaz aani band ho jati hai!
⚠️ DISCLAIMER: Ye video purely Educational aur Science Fair Projects ke liye hai. High power jammers ka use illegal hota hai. snippet.title: Stop Saying Contact — Say This Instead #hamradio #shorts
snippet.description:
QSO is the word for every ham radio contact you make. Every time you talk to someone on the air — that's one QSO. "I made my first QSO today." "That was a 700-mile QSO on 15 meters." Once you start using QSO, you'll never go back to saying "contact" — QSO sounds like you know what you're doing. QSOs are logged, counted, and used for awards. Whether you're on voice, FT-8, or CW, if you're talking to another ham, it's a QSO.

Get the free Ham Radio Beginner Checklist at: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/checklist

snippet.description:
I kept hearing about Tiles On The Air (TOTA)… but I didn’t really get it—until I actually tried it.

In this video, I take you along for a real-world look at how TOTA works, what makes it different, and why it might completely change how you approach portable operating.

If you’ve spent time with Parks on the Air or chasing grid squares, this is going to feel familiar—but with a twist. Instead of parks, you’re activating map tiles… and suddenly where you operate matters in a whole new way.

👉 Check out TOTA here: https://tilesontheair.com/Home

🔍 What You’ll Learn
What Tiles On The Air (TOTA) actually is
How activating a tile works in the real world
Why some tiles are more interesting than others
How TOTA compares to POTA and other ham radio activities
The simple way to get started (without overthinking it)
📡 Why TOTA Is Interesting

TOTA isn’t just about making contacts—it’s about where those contacts happen. It encourages exploration, new operating locations, and thinking differently about your setup and strategy.

snippet.description:

As youll see im the video the branch it hung on was approximately 50ft while it peaked around 60ft! this was with thinner pouches to stronger ones should expect higher shots with 70-80ft being reported by others!

Print one yourself!
https://makerworld.com/@Summit_60

(Bambu printer is not requiered! use the drop down on the green bar to download the STLs directly!)

snippet.title: General Awareness 25 April 2026 Daily Current Affairs News #trendingshorts #news #sandeepstudies
snippet.description:
Today News Top Headlines for a Day . This Video is Knowledge Purpose for Current Affairs Questions. 


1. The Reserve Bank of India has cancelled the license of Paytm Payments Bank, and banking services have been discontinued with immediate effect. The RBI stated that depositors' money is safe and that the bank possesses sufficient funds to return all deposits. The current Governor of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) is Shri Sanjay Malhotra.

2.  The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) was jolted on Friday after Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha announced that seven out of 10 parliamentarians from the Upper House were quitting the party and joining the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), marking a political crisis less than a year before assembly elections in Punjab. He further stated that Rajya Sabha MPs Sandeep Pathak, Ashok Kumar Mittal, Harbhajan Singh, Vikramjit Singh Sahney, Swati Maliwal, and Rajender Gupta are with us.

3. On April 23, Dr. Atanu Nath, a professor from Assam, received the 2026 Breakthrough Prize in Fundamental Physics—an honor widely known as the "Oscars of Science." Dr. Atanu Nath was awarded this prize for his experimental work on the magnetic moment of the Muon g-2 particle. The award carries a prize purse of $3 million. The Muon g-2 experiment was conducted at CERN, Brookhaven National Laboratory, and Fermilab, involving the participation of 376 scientists from across the globe, including 11 Indian researchers. Dr. Atanu Nath is the first Indian to receive the "Oscars of Science." He currently serves as an Assistant Professor of Physics at Tihu College in Assam.


Thanks for Connect us & Hope you enjoyed the Video... Radhe -Radhe🙏

snippet.title: How to Call Any Station with Just Two Letters #hamradio #tutorial
snippet.description:
CQ is the ham radio way of saying "hello, is anyone out there?" When you call CQ, you're putting out a general invitation — any station can answer. "CQ CQ CQ, this is KD0JYV." You can also call CQ DX to specifically seek distant stations overseas. CQ is how hams find each other. It's the first word of most ham radio conversations, and once you know it, you'll hear it on every frequency. This is ham radio 101 at its most fundamental.

Get the free checklist at Ham Radio Beginner Checklist at: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/checklist

snippet.title: What I Missed With Only a Technician License #hamradio #HFRadio
snippet.description:
My ham radio journey started with a Technician license, and I initially thought that was the extent of the hobby. However, I soon realized the limitations and the true potential of amateur radio license came alive once I ventured into high frequency radio. This experience completely altered my understanding of ham radio basics, showing me the broader world of radio communication.
